textByHash.96c3d3ba13aaf17ca1ec052c2fed0182ed98c22a: Yes of course my friend, you seem to be able to handle yourself with those ghasts really well.
textByHash.9d1746f7da5df44fe93aaecf5e9e06c638bdfeb3: Very well done! Here you go!
textByHash.c89dc6540830cd3b6adb2e044b5aed006a586667: What... Oh, don't creep up on me like that... I thought you were a Ghast!
textByHash.e84a9c524e9271ad3b32372b3a030ad17db4c0bf: Absolutely not! I've been given strict instructions not to let anyone through. It's just too dangerous. No one gets in without Drezels say so!
textByHash.ed652976097aecfe8be7ab89d8c7bf2a4ddfaf0c: Oh, he's in the temple, just go back over the bridge, down the ladder and along the hallway, you can't miss him.
